decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_125th-laguardia-sbs, which is the correct canonical record for M60 SBS on 125th Street. The observation's base_record_id equals the registry record_id with matching payload route_id M60, route_type select_bus_service, boroughs Manhattan/Queens. New observation for same record.
